productName: Tasty Terps - TT BHO 1g - Strawberry Kiwi Dum Dum - 1g
description: Classic hybrid BHO crafted from Strawberry Kiwi Dum Dum — hydrocarbon-extracted, fully purged, and dense with cannabinoids for an efficient, hard-hitting dab. Potent, clean, and lab-tested — a sweet, juicy strawberry flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance.
